name: Dutch Baby Pancakes
recipeIngredient: Nectarines or Strawberries and/or Raspberries & Blueberries, or Lemon wedges
recipeInstructions:
PREHEAT OVEN TO 450°F 15 minutes before baking. Have a 10-inch glass pie plate or cast iron skillet ready.
Mix the milk, flour, eggs, sugar, and vanilla until smooth in a food processor, blender, or with a whisk. The batter can be made up to one day ahead and refrigerated.
Place the butter in the pie plate or skillet and put it in the hot oven until melted. Brush the sides and rim of the pan so that the entire inside surface is well coated.
Slowly pour the batter into the pie plate or skillet and bake for 20 minutes.
Reduce the temperature to 350°F and continue baking until the pancake is well browned and cooked through, about 8 to 10 more minutes.
Remove from the oven and sift confectioners' sugar over the top. Serve immediately, with fruit spooned into the center or with lemon wedges.
